arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen predicted XI vs Bochum: Xabi Alonso to rotate after Liverpool defeat
arts.sum: Xabi Alonso is expected to make several changes to his Bayer Leverkusen team that suffered a 4-0 defeat against Liverpool in midweek. The Spaniard could make three or more alterations…

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich 'hatch swap deal plan' to beat Man City, Real Madrid to Florian Wirtz
arts.sum: Bayern Munich could allegedly attempt to use Bayer Leverkusen's interest in Paul Wanner in order to win the race for the in-demand Florian Wirtz.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid consider January moves for Tottenham & Bayer Leverkusen stars
arts.sum: The powers that be at La Liga giants Real Madrid are considering dipping into the market for right-back reinforcements this winter. That’s according to Marca, who have on Friday provided…
Former Liverpool defender Stephen Warnock praises Arne Slot's tactical ability after the Reds' 4-0 Champions League win against Bayer Leverkusen
At a press conference on Friday, Xabi Alonso confirmed that Martin Terrier will once again miss out for Bayer Leverkusen when they face Bochum on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Leverkusen announce new deal for Adli
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen have announced a contract extension for the currently injured Amine Adli.

arts.ttl: Bochum vs Bayer Leverkusen preview: Champions stuck in rut
arts.sum: Following their heavy defeat at Anfield on Tuesday, reigning champions Bayer Leverkusen will look to bounce back as they head to Vonovia Ruhrstadion on Saturday to face VfL Bochum in their 10th Bundesliga match of the 2024-25 season.
Week 10 of the Bundesliga promises to serve up plenty of entertainment and Tom McGarry has provided a score prediction for each of the nine games.

arts.ttl: Leipzig join Leverkusen in showing interest in Bayern youngster, Bild reports
arts.sum: According to Bild, RB Leipzig have joined the list of suitors for Paul Wanner, who has also been linked with Bayer Leverkusen.

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen plan to steal Bayern Munich jewel Paul Wanner
arts.sum: According to Florian Plettenberg, Bayer Leverkusen are looking to prize Paul Wanner away from Bayern Munich in the summer. The 18-year-old is currently on loan at Heidenheim, where he has…
